title: Iffex's Easy Additions
description: A simple data pack that introduces some quality of life changes and new features to Minecraft
body:
This is a simple data pack that adds some vanilla friendly additions to your world such as quality of life or new recipes that should already exist in vanilla minecraft.

##  **Gameplay Features:**

### **Improved Fishing**

- Replaces the vanilla treasure loot table with three new crates containing the original loot plus some extra goodies. These include the Wooden Crate, Iron Crate, and Golden Crate
- Added a new enchantment: "Ocean's Fortune", it slightly increases the chance of fishing up treasure crates and decreases the time between each catch. It can be found through fishing or enchanting a fishing rod. Ocean's Fortune can stack with Lure and Luck of the Sea
- You can fish up mobs, such as a Drowned, these will drop loot and some additional crates
- Luck of the Sea's maximum level is 5 instead of 3

### **Random Zombie Size**

- Zombies can randomly spawn up to 15% bigger or smaller than a vanilla Zombie

### **Gravel Washing**

- Gravel turns into sand when dropped into a cauldron filled with water, allowing for a new source of renewable sand

### **Armored Elytra**

- Using a Netherite Ingot with an Elytra and a Netherite Upgrade Temple inside a Smithing Table, you can add armor to your eltra

### **Alchemist Villager Type**

- A new potion related villager that can spawn instead of a cleric villager. The Alchemist can buy or sell potion related items, ingredients, and even potions

### **Void Hopper**

- A craftable block that sucks up items in a large radius

### **New Advancements**

- Several new advancements, similar to the base game, have been added

## **Quality of Life Features:**

### **Melon Rework**

- Melon blocks now drop themselves when mined, meaning fortune or silk touch is no longer needed
- Melon slices can be crafted using a single melon block
   
### **Iron Golem Healing**

- Naturally spawing Iron Golems now slowly restore health over time
  
### **Personal Piston**

- Similar to the 2023 Mob Vote's Crab Claw, the Personal Piston is a craftable item that increases the player's placement range by one block

### **Improved Blast Furnace Functionality**

- Most furnace recipes have been put into the blast Furnace except dyes and glazed terracotta.
- Raw iron, copper, and gold blocks can now be smelted in a blast furnace into their smelted block form (Raw Copper Block -> Copper Block)

### **Block of Quartz Conversion Recipe**

- Block of Quartz can be crafted back into four quartz

## **New Recipes:**

### **Name Tag Recipe**

- Adds a name tag recipe

### **Invisible Item Frame**

- An invisible item frame that allows for decoration or storage room organization

### **Music Disc Recipe**

- Music discs dropped from Creepers can be crafted into other music discs dropped from Creepers using a stonecutter

### **Leaf Litter Recipe**

- Leaf litter can be crafted using any leaf block
